focus_points.label: Principal-level impact and leverage showing up
focus_points.reason: What’s visible from his Principal scope on this team yet—could be steady delivery without enough leverage, or the impact is happening but not being named or measured clearly.

focus_points.label: What Principal scope means on this team
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s operating on the new team’s expectations or old assumptions—worth clarifying what “good” looks like for Principal work here and how he’s interpreting it.

focus_points.label: Cross-team trust and hard decisions
focus_points.reason: What he’s doing to build trust beyond his immediate team and make judgment calls visible—Principal work often shows up in how he manages expectations and escalates hard news early.

focus_points.label: Judgment calls: when to push vs escalate
focus_points.reason: How they’re calibrating tradeoffs and deciding when to handle vs when to pull you in—at Principal level, the quality of calls is a primary differentiator in performance conversations.

focus_points.label: Early expectation alignment and question-asking
focus_points.reason: Whether his “early alignment” is improving—notes suggest he asks very few questions, so it’s worth checking if he’s getting ahead of misunderstandings or still waiting for certainty before engaging.
